title: Headlight Slice Cinematic Night Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Headlight Slice Cinematic Night Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Hyper-realistic cinematic night close-up portrait of an adult woman with calm but alert eyes in a sweeping headlight slice. Subject: an adult woman with calm but alert eyes wears Hyper-realistic close-up portrait of a woman with slightly disheveled, wind-tousled hair, dressed in a distressed leather jacket., with wind-tousled hair or late-night texture and an emotional tone of Hyper-realistic cinematic portrait photography with urban nocturnal realism, motion energy, sharp skin texture, gritty wardrobe detail, and dramatic film-still atmosphere. Deep blacks, cold white headlight beam, wet. Scene: wet downtown street with blurred car lights provides the urban nighttime backdrop with motion blur, deep shadows, and a fleeting roadside-cinema atmosphere. Composition: Tight close-up portrait with the face partly cut by a sweeping white headlight beam from one side, deep shadow on the opposite side, and a dramatic moment of brightness across the eyes and cheek. Signature Elements: Headlight beam across face, distressed jacket texture, wind-tousled hair, deep shadow contrast, wet city night backdrop, fleeting suspenseful expression, and dramatic cinematic motion feel. Fixed source details: Wardrobe Texture: a distressed black leather jacket; Emotional Tone: fleeting, guarded, cinematic. Style: Hyper-realistic cinematic portrait photography with urban nocturnal realism, motion energy, sharp skin texture, gritty wardrobe detail, and dramatic film-still atmosphere. Color Palette: Deep blacks, cold white headlight beam, wet asphalt reflections, muted urban blues, small amber streetlight accents, natural skin tones, and restrained high-contrast grade. Lighting: A sweeping white headlight beam slices across the face from one side, creating a hard fleeting highlight against deep shadow, with subtle rim light and blurred city glow in the background. Camera: Close-up portrait crop, shallow depth of field, cinematic compression, slight motion feel, and strong focus on the illuminated facial plane. Restrictions: Keep one adult subject, realistic skin, coherent eyes, readable facial structure, natural wardrobe texture, and a clean headlight slice;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
